message:
fix(runtime): improve CLUSTER HELP and ACL HELP output to match Redis format

Replace the generic CLUSTER HELP scaffold description with a proper
per-subcommand listing (INFO, MYID, KEYSLOT, SLOTS, SHARDS, NODES,
RESET) matching Redis's actual CLUSTER HELP output format.

Add the DRYRUN subcommand entry to ACL HELP output and include a
dedicated test asserting its presence.

Update the existing CLUSTER HELP test assertions to match the new
per-subcommand output format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
